lines.speaker: Ur-meg
lines.text: Oh dear...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What's the matter?

lines.speaker: Ur-meg
lines.text: I'm worried. I think the Council is neglecting a big issue. I tried to bring it up at the last meeting, but they didn't pay attention.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What issue?

lines.speaker: Ur-meg
lines.text: I'm very happy for you humans to come down to the city, but what about...them?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What about who?

lines.speaker: Ur-meg
lines.text: Them! *whispers* The G-O-D-S.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: The gods?

lines.speaker: Ur-meg
lines.text: Don't say it! What if they hear?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Why are you scared of the gods?

lines.speaker: Ur-meg
lines.text: Because they're so powerful, of course!

lines.speaker: Ur-meg
lines.text: In the time of the great war, they forced all the goblin tribes to fight one another. Our ancestors weren't powerful enough to stand up to them.

lines.speaker: Ur-meg
lines.text: We've hidden down here for this long, but now the way to the surface is open, what if they find us again?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Goodbye.

lines.speaker: Ur-meg
lines.text: Goodbye.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You don't need to worry!

lines.speaker: Ur-meg
lines.text: I don't?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: The God Wars are over! The gods don't intervene directly in the affairs of mortals any more.

lines.speaker: Ur-meg
lines.text: Are you sure?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes!

lines.speaker: Ur-meg
lines.text: I do hope you're right! I still can't help being worried, though.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Don't you want to worship the god of the goblins?

lines.speaker: Ur-meg
lines.text: No! How could you even suggest that? We're not going to worship some supernatural being just because it's bigger and more powerful than us.

lines.speaker: Ur-meg
lines.text: It may seem to you that we're cowardly, hiding here from the gods all this time, but I know that every Dorgeshuun would rather die than submit to the rule of any god.
